meaning: adj.接触的,切线的,相切的,离题的n.切线,[数]正切
examples: The conversation went off on a tangent.
In this paper base tangent length is put forward and lead angle calculating formula is deduced.
It is really the tangent plane.
Goldman is going off on a tangent and is not really discussing any real challenges.
"I'm sorry, but I feel you guys were off on a tangent there, " Robinson said.
